# Amigos Plumbing & Drain Cleaning Inc

> Family-owned plumbing company serving Sacramento, CA and surrounding areas since 2009. Available 24/7 for emergency plumbing, drain cleaning, water heater service, and leak detection. Licensed, bonded & insured — CA Contractor Lic. #1150558. 5-star rated with 47+ Google reviews.

## Contact
- Phone: (916) 598-3162
- Email: jesse@amigosplumbinganddrain.com
- Hours: 24/7, 365 days a year
- Service Area: Greater Sacramento metropolitan area

## Services
- 24/7 Emergency Plumbing — burst pipes, sewer backups, flooding
- Drain Cleaning — hydro-jetting, snaking, root removal, camera inspection
- Water Heater — installation, repair, replacement, tankless units
- Leak Detection — slab leaks, hidden pipe leaks, water line breaks
- Fixture Installation — faucets, toilets, sinks, garbage disposals, showers
- Plumbing Repair — pipes, valves, shut-offs, pressure regulators
- Maintenance & Inspections — preventive checkups, camera inspections

## Service Area
Sacramento, Elk Grove, Roseville, Carmichael, Citrus Heights, Rancho Cordova, Fair Oaks, Orangevale, Antelope, North Highlands, West Sacramento, Davis, Woodland, Natomas, Galt, Folsom, Granite Bay, Rocklin, Lincoln

## Key Facts
- Founded: 2009
- Owner: Jesse
- License: CA Lic. #1150558
- Rating: 5.0 stars (47+ reviews)
- Languages: English, Spanish
- Pricing: Free estimates, upfront pricing, no hidden fees
- Payment: Cash, credit card, check
